note: Seed playlists for initial artist discovery. `mvp_priority` indicates whether we ingest artists from this playlist at Stage 1. Stage 1 only pulls from `priority: critical` + `priority: high`. Lower priorities can be ingested later if coverage gaps appear.

playlists.name: Rap Venezolano
playlists.rationale: Canonical Venezuelan rap playlist. Core of the MVP seed.

playlists.name: Trap & Drill Venezolano
playlists.rationale: New generation (trap/drill) venezolano. Captures artists not covered by Rap Venezolano playlist.

playlists.name: Rap Latino Clasicos
playlists.rationale: Classic Latin rap. Anchors historical references and peripheral artists (Mexico, Spain, PR) that collab with VE scene.

playlists.name: Latin Jamz
playlists.rationale: Broader Latin hip-hop. Biggest follower count of the set — wide source of peripheral artists for collab graph.

playlists.name: Rap Latino Chillin
playlists.rationale: Cola larga latina. Process at Stage 1 only if capacity allows.

playlists.name: My 2023 Playlist in a Bottle
playlists.rationale: Personal curator playlist. Potentially useful signal of what k12jamz was listening to in 2023 but noisy.

playlists.name: Classic Jamz (R&B)
playlists.rationale: R&B, not hip-hop. Skip for MVP.

additional_sources_needed.note: k12jamz covers Venezuelan trap/drill and Latin classics well, but we should add 3-5 more curator sources to complete coverage. Suggestions to solicit from Luis:
gaps: Women in Venezuelan rap (Gabylonia-adjacent). k12jamz underrepresents.
Freestyle battles / Red Bull Batalla de los Gallos VE chapter
Colombian and Spanish rap curators for peripheral graph
Dauton Media's own editorial playlists (to create in Stage 1)
